Deli & Market
​Daily Menus
Meals are available for
$15.95 per person
.
Pick up between 4-6 pm
on the day listed below.
Please call (404) 205-5092 to place your order.
When you order, please let us know if you would like to include any of the following:
- Ciabatta rolls ($2.99 each)
- Meatballs 3 oz ($3.50 each)
- A bottle of wine
Note:
Meals are served cold in containers that can be heated in the microwave. If you prefer to pick up your food hot, please let us know and tell us what time you would like to pick it up.
Daily Menus
Wednesday – Baked Spinach and Ricotta Cannelloni,
Side Salad
Thursday – Spaghetti with Meatballs, Side Salad
Friday – Baked Shells (Vegetarian), Side Salad
Saturday – Eggplant Parmigiana, Side Salad
Sunday – Meat Lasagna, Side Salad
Don't forget dessert!
-
Cannoli
-
Torta della Nonna
(Grandmother's Cake)
:
Pastry cream on a base of shortcrust pastry, covered with pine nuts, almonds and powdered sugar.
​-
Pistachio Cheesecake:
A creamy pistachio cheesecake with pistachio pieces, topped with a light pistachio mousse and sprinkled with pistachios, on a cookie crumb base.
-
Limoncello Cake
-
Cannoli
​
-
Tiramisù:
Sponge cake soaked in espresso, topped with mascarpone cream and dusted with cocoa powder
-
Gelato (Mango, Raspberry, Nutella, Strawberry, Chocolate Chip)
